query:
SELECT fi.id, fi.name, fi.unit, fi.isActive,
  (SELECT ph.pricePerUnit FROM feed_item_price_history ph WHERE ph.feedItemId = fi.id ORDER BY ph.effectiveDate DESC, ph.id DESC LIMIT 1) as latestPrice,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feed_item_price_history ph WHERE ph.feedItemId = fi.id) as priceHistoryCount
FROM feed_items fi
WHERE fi.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY fi.name;
command:
